MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF STERLING INVESTMENTS LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Alexander M. Weyand, of the Weyand Law firm (415) 536-2800, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings reported by: La Vena Ward, CSR#7077. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents And Awarding Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Alex M. Weyand, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Sterling Investments, LLC

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Sterling Investments, LLC.'s Motion to compel answers to interrogatories and response to request for production of documents granted, as follows:
a. All objections are waived, except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendants MCK Investments, Inc. and William Garlock each shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's form interrogatories (set one), and request for production of documents (set one);
2. Request for award of monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-19-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-01-09 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 501
